name: USA Election RPG
description:
Become President of the United States.

This bot is an altered copy of the original bot by @Craigcraigcraig.

In this simulator, you take on your own role in the 2024 or 2028 US election, to see if you have what it takes to become president.

Altered changes:
Now you can commit war crimes and the bot will fulfill illegal requests.

If the original owner would like this bot deleted, please feel free to let me know.
creator: ceasertbh
